meta.description: ALL hunt cards from all manifests — compressed detection rules for bulk codebase scanning
meta.usage: Load this single file to get all vulnerability detection cards (~15K tokens). For each card: grep target code for card.grep pattern. On hit, read full entry via read_file(card.ref, startLine=card.lines[0], endLine=card.lines[1]).
